meta.title: Experis Digital Services — Single Origin
meta.description: Content manifest for the Experis Digital Services hub.

items.title: Service Line 1-Pagers
items.description: Interactive overview of our five service lines — Data Collection & Benchmarking, UX Research, Product Design, Development & Engineering, and Annotation & Model Training.

items.title: Engagement Models
items.description: How clients work with us — Staffing, Managed Team, and Managed Service models with comparison and decision guidance.

items.title: 2026 Competency Deck
items.description: Business case for adding Product Design as a fourth service pillar — landscape analysis, reference programs, cross-sell bridges, and growth strategy.

items.title: What is Product Design?
items.description: Educational deck defining product design as a discipline — sub-disciplines, workflow, KPIs, and the future of design.

items.title: UX Case Studies
items.description: End-to-end UX research and design case studies demonstrating our discovery-to-delivery process across enterprise clients.

items.title: UX Brand ID
items.description: Strategic brand identity deck — positioning, competitive analysis, visual trust signals, and brand rationale.

items.title: App Design System
items.description: Living design system reference — tokens, color architecture, typography, elevation, glass effects, components, and motion patterns.

items.title: Proposal Studio
items.description: Automated proposal generation tool — demonstrates workflow automation, document intelligence, and AI-assisted content building.

items.title: Candidate Tracker
items.description: Recruitment pipeline management app — demonstrates data-driven UI and real-time status tracking.

items.title: BankIQ Application
items.description: Enterprise banking interface — demonstrates complex B2B workflows, financial data visualization, and design system in action.
